title: Tech Magic Creator (TMC)
description: TMC is a mod that combines the advantages of a technical mod and interesting mechanics of a magical one.
body:
**MOD VERSION 1.0.1 AND HIGHER REQUER'S GEKO LIB!!!!!!!!!**



This mod allows you to build X2 ore processing systems. I also tried to make a weapon with increased power. Realistic crafts will be available to you. The magic component of the mod is based on the world of C400 from a little-known series of books, therefore it is not found in any of the other modifications and is therefore unique.

Experimental mod. Assembly in MCreator. I want to show that MCreator is as good as other IDE's for creating Minecraft mods. This is something between IC2 and a standard magic mod.

Report here: https://t.me/akasu_empir1008

Main creator: Mirainokami Akai



Fix Reports:

In version 1.0.1 of the mod, the rubber extraction path has been updated. Now you need to find the rubber bug in the Deep Dark, on the mushroom island or in the dark oak forest.

V1.0.2 - Fixed the appearance of the rubber beetle

V1.0.3 - Fixed a bug with rubber thickener falling out

V1.1.0 - Complete fix of mechanisms bugs. The Rubber Beetle will now spawn in Deep Dark dungeons

V1.1.1 - Weapon update. Update rifle in 3D skin, with new animations and new mekanic
